title: Carapace Agent Identity Card
description: The badge — a cryptographically signed identity card for an autonomous AI agent.

schema_version.description: Version of the identity card schema.

agent_id.description: Permanent unique identifier for this agent. Never changes.

agent_name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

description.description: Brief description of the agent's purpose and capabilities.

protocol_version.description: Carapace protocol version this card conforms to.

owner.description: The human or organization that created and controls this agent.

contact.description: Contact URI or email for the owner.

verified.description: Whether the owner identity has been verified by the registry.

capabilities.description: Skills and functions this agent can perform.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the expected input.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the expected output.

async_supported.description: Whether this capability supports asynchronous execution.

endpoints.description: Network endpoints where this agent can be reached.

verification.description: Cryptographic signature proving the card is authentic.

public_key.description: Base64url-encoded public key of the owner.

key_id.description: Identifier for the signing key (for key rotation tracking).

signature.description: Base64url-encoded signature over the canonicalized card (JCS / RFC 8785). Set to empty string during signing.

signed_at.description: UTC timestamp when the card was signed.

registry.description: Registry metadata. Set by the registry, not the owner.

node_id.description: Identifier of the registry node that stores this card.

registered_at.description: UTC timestamp when the card was first registered.

last_verified_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last successful signature verification by the registry.

federation_peers.description: Registry nodes that also hold a copy of this card.

chain_anchors.description: Blockchain or decentralized identity anchors for this agent.

interval_seconds.description: How often the agent checks in or runs its loop.

last_seen.description: UTC timestamp of the agent's last heartbeat.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the agent identity.

well_known_uri.description: URL where the A2A-compatible /.well-known/agent.json is hosted.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value store for custom fields.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the card was first created.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last modification.
